subcodes.first_line: Glory be to Thee, O Lord my God, and praise be unto Thee, inasmuch as Thou hast illumined my heart with the light of Thy knowledge, hast honored me with Thy presence
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی ان السدره تنادیک و یا امتی ان المحبوب یذکرک لک ان تفتخری بالفضلین
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for spiritual recognition
